title: Fossils & Archeology Plus
description: Using Fabulously Optimized as a base with Fossils & Archeology Revival as its centerpiece, this modpack brings a vanilla+ experience to 1.20.1!
body:
Hatch, care and display your pre-historic creatures with Fossils & Archeology, and enhance your builds with Create and various of its addons.

Explore an enhanced world with Geolithic, Biomes O' Plenty and other vanilla-esk inclusions. Base game structures are improved with Yung's structure mods, and a small amount of new strutures can be found alongside them! Alongside this, backports for later offical updates are also included. 

Enjoy a sprinkling of vanilla style mods, such as new ores that fit the early game for a dash of variety. Wood varients for chests, barrels, crafting tables and more - with compatibility for the offerings in Biomes O' Plenty! 

Keep other dimentions interesting with BetterEnd and BetterNether also packed with compatibilities with other mods found in the pack such as Farmer's Delight.

Essentials included for easy multiplayer with friends.

Fossils & Archeology Plus is built upon this version Fabulously Optimized: https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized/version/5.4.1

- There is currently an issue in which falling leaves (Spring to Life Backport) appear grey for some modded leaf blocks, currently looking for a fix.
